outfit_info.outfit_description: A model wears a black bomber jacket over an off-white printed tee, paired with khaki cargo pants and navy sneakers. A tan beanie, silver chain, and gold ring complete the urban-inspired ensemble. The look is grounded in practical style, offering a comfortable yet structured aesthetic suitable for city exploration and everyday wear.

model_attributes.body: Lean, athletic build with a direct, serious gaze, projecting confidence and a grounded, urban presence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with a relaxed stance, left arm slightly bent holding an object, right hand casually in pocket.
model_attributes.background: A vibrant, cyberpunk-inspired alleyway scene with neon signs, weathered buildings, and pigeons, suggesting an urban market.

outfit.P00859199: beige hybrid flared cotton cargo pants
